entry.title: Faster Small Language Model Pretraining with Cache-Aware Kernels
entry.summary: We show a training recipe for a small language model that improves tokens/sec via cache-aware CUDA kernels while matching validation loss.

entry.title: A New Long Context Method Using RoPE Scaling to 128k
entry.summary: A long context approach extending the context window to 128k with rope position encoding and a sliding window attention variant.
